gap_class.4: Limited transit access, mostly needs a car
gap_class.5: Few book sources by any mode
gap_class.6: Very few book sources by any mode

_meta.gap_rule: Transit-first. Q1 (car_bin = best-case breadth of reachable book sources): car_bin 1 -> 6 (very few), car_bin 2 -> 5 (few). Q2 for car_bin>=3, graded by pt_bin (transit's own statewide quintile): pt_bin 5 ->1 strong, 4 ->2 good, 3 ->3 some, 0/1/2 ->4 limited. Tiers are relative to CT transit; even strong transit reaches a narrower set than a car.
